Appearances:
Plaintiff John Stewart Company is present. Represented by Larisa Troche.
Attorney John Zanghi for the plaintiff.
Defendant Charles Baldwin is present.
Attorney Kyle Bassman appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer in Dept.501A, for settlement discussions. This case settled. The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed. The trial date of JAN-19-2016 is vacated. (JPT/501)
